runs.description: No continuous chart loop; isolates mount and worklet cost.
Current production line renderer and canonical live baseline.
Coalesces steady engine publications to a fixed 30 fps.
Uses visible pixel velocity to choose a 30–60 fps cadence.
Keeps cubic geometry but removes round stroke caps and joins.
Removes cubic geometry while retaining round stroke edges.
Straight segments with the simplest built-in stroke edges.
Triples incoming point density while preserving the baseline renderer.
Doubles the raster mask height while preserving path complexity.
